MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Anthony K. McClaren, esq. (213-623-6546) of Adli Law Group, PC for Petitioner William S. Eidelman via courtcall.
Edward K. Kim, esq. (213-269-6540) of State of California Dept of Justice for Respondent.

RULING - A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction (Per Ex Parte Order Filed 1/29/19).

Petitioner's petition for writ of administrative mandamus is denied. (see word minutes for full details) (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript).

Order is signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
